journal_entry.description: Refinance bank loan - replace old note with new note
journal_entry.rationale: Refinancing transaction where the old loan liability is extinguished and replaced by a new loan liability of equal amount. Debit the old Loan Payable (liability decrease) to remove it from the books, and credit the new Loan Payable (liability increase) to record the new obligation. No cash changes hands in a pure refinancing, and there is no gain/loss since the amounts are equal. This is a liability-to-liability exchange transaction.

output.reason: Refinancing replaces one loan with another. The debit side records the elimination of the old loan liability. Paying off/eliminating the old $100 note = liability decrease (1 line).

debit_classifier.reason: Refinancing replaces one loan with another. The debit side records the elimination of the old loan liability. Paying off/eliminating the old $100 note = liability decrease (1 line).

output.reason: Refinancing replaces one loan with another of equal value. On the credit side: the old loan liability is decreased (debit the old liability) and the new loan liability is increased (credit the new liability). Credit side shows: new loan = liability increase (1 line).

credit_classifier.reason: Refinancing replaces one loan with another of equal value. On the credit side: the old loan liability is decreased (debit the old liability) and the new loan liability is increased (credit the new liability). Credit side shows: new loan = liability increase (1 line).

output.description: Refinance bank loan - replace old note with new note
output.rationale: Refinancing transaction where the old loan liability is extinguished and replaced by a new loan liability of equal amount. Debit the old Loan Payable (liability decrease) to remove it from the books, and credit the new Loan Payable (liability increase) to record the new obligation. No cash changes hands in a pure refinancing, and there is no gain/loss since the amounts are equal. This is a liability-to-liability exchange transaction.

output.reason: Entry correctly records a loan refinancing transaction. The old loan liability is debited (liability decrease) for $100 and the new loan liability is credited (liability increase) for $100. Entry balances (debits $100 = credits $100). Amounts match transaction text. This is appropriate treatment under IFRS for a debt modification where old debt is extinguished and replaced with new debt of equal value. No cash changes hands, no gain/loss recognition needed since amounts are equal. Accounts are appropriately named and directionally correct.
